column3: = П„ вҖӢ ( x 1 w d вҖӢ ( [ t ] ) вүҘ 0 ) вҖӢ рқ’° вҖӢ ( П„ вҖӢ ( x 2 w d вҖӢ ( [ t ] ) вүҘ 0 ) вҲ§ within вҖӢ [ 5 , 10 ] ) \displaystyle=\tau\bigl(x_{1}^{w_{d}}([t])\geq 0\bigr)\;\mathcal{U}\;\bigl(\tau\bigl(x_{2}^{w_{d}}([t])\geq 0\bigr)\land\textsf{within}[5,10]\bigr)

= ( s j вҖӢ ( x 1 w d ) вүҘ 0 ) вҖӢ рқ’° вҖӢ ( ( s j вҖӢ ( x 2 w d ) вүҘ 0 ) вҲ§ within вҖӢ [ 5 , 10 ] ) \displaystyle=(s_{j}(x_{1}^{w_{d}})\geq 0)\;\mathcal{U}\;\bigl((s_{j}(x_{2}^{w_{d}})\geq 0)\land\textsf{within}[5,10]\bigr)
